# delete_account { #socialinfrascorepy.delete_account }

```python
delete_account(client)
```

Delete the currently authenticated account.

Calls the ``fn_delete_account`` Supabase RPC which initiates
account deletion via the Auth Admin API server-side.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type     | Description                                                                          | Default    |
|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`sign_in`. | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                 |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | dict   | A dictionary with ``status``, ``user_id``, and ``message``. |
